LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR. BASED ON STIPULATION OF COUNSEL, COURT ORDERS THAT MR. MOBLEY IS TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN TWENTY DAYS. DEFENDANT TO RESPOND TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, NOT THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
